title: anthyllis vulneraria proles maura
intro: Anthyllis vulneraria proles maura, also known as the dark-stemmed kidney vetch, is a subspecies of the anthyllis vulneraria plant, belonging to the legume family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and astringent qualities. The plant's health benefits include wound healing, reducing fever, and soothing digestive issues, making it a valuable remedy for various ailments. Anthyllis vulneraria proles maura can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat skin conditions, respiratory issues, and other health problems.
